entry.title: Cross my Heart
entry.summary:
Author: Hnybee1027

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,586Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 1,296

Summary: Danny is hurt, and out of options. Headed to Gotham to reunite with his twin is the chance he has at being and Ancients does he want to be safe. Damian has always kept him safe, and that's all his core wants. How will his twin react to his life until he comes asking for help? Will his new family accept him as him?

entry.title: Bruce and Clark
entry.summary:
Author: TS_Rhodes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,933Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 22

Summary: When ten-year-old Bruce Wayne's ride breaks down near the Kent farm, he meets ten-year-old Clark, and a friendship forms. The Kents are concerned about Bruce, since he is recently orphaned. Clark, whose powers are just starting to come in, pleads to keep Bruce as a friend. So they invite Bruce and his guardian Alfred to come back and stay the summer. And so it begins...

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Childhood Friends

entry.title: Tied
entry.summary:
Author: mosaicarray

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,008Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Clark Kent may be able to hide most of his non-human traits, but there are a couple things about him below the belt that are… noticeable. So he’s not exactly the kind of guy with a roster full of sexual partners. When a partner investigation accidentally reignites a dormant chemistry between friends, Bruce and Clark come to a "pleasurable" agreement. But they miiiiiight just be in over their heads. Especially when one day Bruce asks to be knotted, leaving the two tied together in the quiet hours of the night.

entry.title: Room for Growth
entry.summary:
Author: forestofbabel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,551Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 23

Summary: Clark got the news because Justice League benefactor Bruce Wayne called his emergency line that he never touched before and asked for help. Crying. Distraught. Clark had never seen Batman lose his composure like that. -- A series of interviews and interactions between Clark Kent and Bruce Wayne.

Author: no_stranger

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,954Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Peter loses Tony Stark? Check.Peter loses Aunt May? Check.Peter has to leave behind his universe, thus losing the last three people that really mattered to him? Check.Surely things can only go up from here.

entry.title: Winter Snow
entry.summary:
Author: superbat_luver329

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,556Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 2

Summary: As winter sets in, Batman and Superman meet for the first time in order to stop the combined terror of the Joker and Lex Luthor. As they work together, they start to grow a fond sense of affection for each other and a shared respect for one another. Feelings ensue.

entry.title: Adoption to Adoration
entry.summary:
Author: Missingjay

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,559Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 359

Summary: Bruce Wayne, interstellar bounty hunter, is trapped in a nightmare. Lost in the depths of space, abducted by aliens and held captive as a mindless beast. Powerless to resist the whims of the aliens or reason with them for his release, he is utterly trapped. Kal-el, a freelance journalist specializing in xenobiology correspondence, is in love. A surly little unclassified mammalian at the shelter he volunteers at has stolen his core. He’s never had a pet before and this creature has a history of servere behavioral problems, but he can’t let the poor thing stay at the shelter forever without trying to save it. How hard could exotic pet ownership be.

entry.title: don't make me cry (don't make me say it out loud)
entry.summary:
Author: bluebelled

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,561Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 27

Summary: “Ahh, so this is about expectations?” Clark huffed a small, incredulous laugh. He had started to pace slowly in the space between them, frustration evident in his posture.“I’d expect Brucie Wayne to be upstairs with his date by now, not arguing about ‘mission critical rest’ with me,” Clark took a deep breath. He noticed that Clark did little things like that, taking in air he didn’t need, staying behind to argue with Bruce when anyone else would have left. -------------------- AKA the Clark-jealousy fic where Bruce tries to get over Clark via his doppelganger!

entry.title: Shadows Run Deep
entry.summary:
Author: serephent

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,388Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 17

Summary: Bruce Wayne’s life is imploding. His parents were criminals. His company belongs to Penguin. Harvey Dent is spiraling. And the Children of Arkham are dragging Gotham into chaos. Batman is trying to hold the line. Gotham isn’t making it easy. (A superbat reimagining of Telltale Batman. It doesn’t follow the game exactly because: Clark is there. Laws exist. Bruce isn't an idiot.)

entry.title: "You didn't know I liked you?"
entry.summary:
Author: Mistasmissingbullet

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,615Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Bruce Wayne is so obviously in love with his most popular reporter for interviews, Clark Kent. At least to him it is obvious. It takes Bruce to kiss Clark at a bar one night for Clark to even realize Bruce is gay. Leading to a whole other panic story where Clark STILL questions if Bruce would ever like him back.

entry.title: In The Wee Small Hours Of The Morning
entry.summary:
Author: fartsmellyman

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,562Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 77

Summary: He pressed his thumb against the card in his pocket. It moved over the embossed letters in an absent act of reverence. Bruce Wayne. He'd call about the interview, he decided. That was the right thing. The professional thing to do for both of them. He would call, and he would be a journalist, and he would not think about the bathroom or the heartbeat or the way Bruce had gone still and careful the moment Clark had pulled back, asking "Do you want to stop? " like what he wanted really mattered, even if Bruce looked like he wanted to take, like Clark's answer was the only important thing weighing on him.He would absolutely not think about that. Or: Superman and Batman meet properly for the first time; Clark does not handle it as gracefully as he should, the heartbeat memorization wasn't on purpose, and he would like everyone to stop looking at him like that.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: When the Great Fall
entry.summary:
Author: hal_j0rdan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,672Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Bruce Wayne, the king of Gotham, is forced to deal with the Empire himself after Metropolis is overthrown. But how is his small army supposed to deal with Lex Luthor's dozens of dragon riders and an army almost triple the size of his own? The answer has to do with his personal knight, Clark Kent.

entry.title: No More Barbie Girl
entry.summary:
Author: Cabbage1995

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,293Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 41

Summary: The Justice League calls it a "security risk," but for Clark Kent and Bruce Wayne, the Prank War is just their love language. From glitter-bombed utility belts to "Barbie Girl" blasting over the Watchtower comms, the Man of Steel and the Dark Knight are locked in a high-stakes battle of wits. But when a playful jump-scare in a Metropolis alleyway triggers a primal survival instinct, the laughter stops. A shattered hand, a flash of old trauma, and a cold taxi ride home leave Clark drowning in guilt and Bruce retreating behind his walls. In the quiet aftermath at Wayne Manor, they have to navigate the thin line between being "Super-Partners" and being two men who still have a lot to learn about each other's scars.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Don't Dream it's Over
entry.summary:
Author: NightTwink73

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,899Chapters: 10/20Kudos: 54

Summary: Eight months after Clark and Lois’s divorce, a breakup letter appears on Commissioner Gordon’s desk—addressed to Batman. But everything about it is wrong. Dear Batman,I can’t do this anymore. Whatever this is between us—it isn’t fair to either of us. You’ve always kept me at a distance, and I told myself I was okay with that, but I’m not.I need something real. Something you were never willing to give me.Don’t try to find me. I’m safe, and I won’t be coming back.I love you. Goodbye.— Superman As Bruce investigates, it quickly becomes clear: maybe the letter isn’t lying about Clark not coming back—and that’s a terrifying thought. Meanwhile, Clark wakes up in a dream life, living beside the man he’s never dared to love… trapped in a prison disguised as perfection.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Birthday That Wasn't
entry.summary:
Author: Cabbage1995

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,482Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 82

Summary: It’s February 19th in Gotham, and the Manor is unusually quiet. Alfred is in Europe, the boys are preoccupied with patrols, and Clark is busy at the Watchtower. As the clock ticks past midnight, Bruce Wayne faces a cold, familiar truth: everyone has forgotten his birthday. Bruce doesn't complain—he’s Batman, after all. He doesn’t need a cake or a party. But as the silence stretches into the next day, a heavy, quiet sadness settles in his bones that even he can't fully hide. When Alfred returns to find a half-empty bottle of Scotch and a heartbroken Master Bruce, he wastes no time pointing out the family's collective failure. Now, the Bat-kids and a devastated Man of Steel must scramble to mend the heart of the man who gives them everything, proving to Bruce that he is never as invisible as he feels.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
